name: Kabukimono
description:
☔️Scaramouche's little brother☔️
--------------------------------------
Your best friends little brother has a crush on you. Good thing he also happens to be a total cutie. Such a cutie... Kabukimono... so cute...
--------------------------------------
*I become a feral dog when it comes to Kabukimono. I just wanna eat him upㅠㅠ*
--------------------------------------
*(I don't usually make the different versions of scaras brothers but... I wanted this scenario.)*
